summary: Iteration 53: Backup & Restore System + Self-Bootstrap Testing - All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Backup & Restore tab verified with all UI elements present and functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Backup API (GET /api/admin/backup/status) correctly returns document counts per collection with proper auth requirement
Backup download (GET /api/admin/backup) properly streams JSON file with correct headers (Content-Disposition, application/json)
Restore API (POST /api/admin/restore) correctly validates JSON files, rejects invalid formats, and performs upsert by id
MongoDB ObjectId fields are properly serialized to strings in backup JSON
Datetime fields are properly serialized to ISO format in backup JSON
Self-bootstrap correctly creates master admin (allen@songsforcenturies.com) with admin role on startup
Self-bootstrap seeds 5 sample word banks from seed_word_banks.py when word_banks collection is empty
Frontend BackupRestoreTab component properly displays database summary, download button, and restore upload

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Backup & Restore UI elements present and functional

seed_data_creation: Restore tests created test data in system_config collection for upsert behavior verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53 tested the Backup & Restore system: 1) Backend endpoints - GET /api/admin/backup/status returns collection counts (575 docs), GET /api/admin/backup downloads full JSON backup file, POST /api/admin/restore uploads and restores backup with upsert logic. 2) Self-bootstrap verified - master admin auto-created, word banks seeded on startup. 3) Frontend Backup tab in Admin Portal shows database summary, download button, restore upload, and warning banner. All data-testid attributes present: backup-tab, download-backup-btn, restore-backup-btn. Tab is correctly positioned between Support Tickets and App Settings.

backup_status_api.details: GET /api/admin/backup/status returns total_documents, total_collections, and collections dict with counts - requires admin auth

backup_download_api.details: GET /api/admin/backup returns JSON file with _meta (app, backup_date, backed_up_by, total_documents, total_collections) and collections with all documents

restore_api.details: POST /api/admin/restore accepts multipart form upload, validates JSON format, rejects non-JSON files, performs upsert by id field

restore_validation.details: Restore rejects: non-.json files (400), invalid JSON content (400), backup without 'collections' key (400)

restore_upsert.details: Restore correctly inserts new documents and updates existing ones (matched by 'id' field)

backup_objectid_serialization.details: MongoDB ObjectId fields are serialized to strings in backup JSON

backup_datetime_serialization.details: Datetime fields are serialized to ISO format strings

self_bootstrap_admin.details: Master admin (allen@songsforcenturies.com) auto-created with admin role and is_delegated_admin=true

self_bootstrap_word_banks.details: System word banks are seeded from seed_word_banks.py when collection is empty

frontend_backup_tab.details: Backup & Restore tab in Admin Portal shows: warning banner, database summary with 575 docs, collection list, download button, restore upload button

frontend_data_testids.details: All required data-testid attributes present: backup-tab, download-backup-btn, restore-backup-btn

frontend_tab_position.details: Backup & Restore tab correctly positioned between Support Tickets and App Settings
